allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\Source\\Repos\\codeempty.com-cc"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c npx wrangler pages dev dist --port 8788 --compatibility-date 2024-01-01" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; Write-Output "PID: $\($proc.Id\)")

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\Source\\Repos\\codeempty.com-cc"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c npx wrangler pages dev dist --port 8788 --compatibility-date 2024-01-01" -PassThru -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Output "Server running \(PID $\($proc.Id\)\)" } else { Write-Output "Server exited with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)" })
